name: bufab-start-template
description: Starter template for Bufab projects. Pulls the bufab-mcp server from npm and wires up Claude Code, Cline, and Cursor hooks so the design system and infrastructure rules are enforced from the first commit.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run guidelines:init && npm run verify
scripts.mcp:update: npm install @greadcadinho/bufab-mcp@latest && git submodule update --remote --merge guidelines
